reviews.review_description: Outstanding game play amazing graphics what  more do you want
Where can I find game instructions?

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for the fine ratings, and showing interest in learning about the game.

Love Cubed is a love story in which you, as the Hero, save your loved one from other cubes and villains. 
The game is controlled by your gaze pointer. Moving your head around will move your Hero cube squashing and splashing through enemies. There will be some stronger enemies than you’ve anticipated, so you’ll be needing upgrades (which you can find on Main Menu of the game, or will appear in pop-up options whenever you’ll be needing them)
We’re working on an update which will include the gameplay instructions, along with some enhanced features for movement control, so stay tuned. In case of any other query, you can mail us at users@bigimmersive.com 

Many Thanks
Big Immersive
